notes: Game starts at opengl engine with very low performance and without some textures. After forcing vulkan engine game runs smooth but crash when trying render warship.
title: War Thunder

notes: Playing through Proton/Wine starting from version 1.83.1.x results in regular crashes, and some benchmarks, like Tank Battle, will always crash the game. Switching the renderer to Vulkan resolves some of the issues, but the Vulkan renderer also has serious instability on random matches, Native or Proton/Wine. No bugfixes are planned for these issues.
title: War Thunder
